title: Global MIDI Monitor + DAW Stem Track Controls
description: Makes MIDI monitoring always available from any tab as a floating panel with tailf/polling mode. Adds per-stem volume, mute, solo, and balance controls to the DAW editor with real-time AudioContext application.

stories.title: MidiMonitorComponent LiveComponent
stories.description: Floating MIDI monitor LiveComponent always rendered in DashboardLive. Supports manual snapshot capture and tailf continuous streaming via send_update/3. Shows event log with type, channel, label, value columns. Filter by All/Note/CC/Clock/Other.
acceptance_criteria: MIDI monitor toggle button visible on all tabs
Panel shows floating overlay at bottom-right
Start/Stop toggles PubSub subscription for raw midi:messages:{port_id}
tailf mode auto-scrolls to newest event
Events display type, channel, note/cc label, value
Filter buttons narrow event list by type

stories.title: Per-stem mixer controls: volume, mute, solo, pan
stories.description: Adds M/S buttons and VOL/PAN range sliders to each stem header in the DAW tab. State stored in stem_mixer assign. Applied to AudioContext gainNode + StereoPannerNode on preview playback. Live updates via stem_mix_update push_event.
acceptance_criteria: M button mutes stem (yellow when active)
S button solos stem, silences others (green when active)
Changes apply immediately to active preview via setTargetAtTime
Solo logic: if any stem soloed, non-solo stems are silenced
